productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Striped White Sweatshirt
description: Composition White sweatshirt with mustard colour stripes made of 100% cotton, has long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, lined hood with chunky drawcords, pouch pocket on front and ribbed hem with printed branding Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations; press while damp for crisp finish Comfort at it's best, this sweatshirt from classic polo guarantees a warm cosy feeling, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pop it on over sportswear or casual clothing for a relaxed and stylish top layer. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
